## Describe the bug
A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What should have happened.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste any error output.

## Environment
- Device: (e.g. Pixel 8, Windows 11)
- OS version: (e.g. Android 15, Windows 11 26200)
- App version: (e.g. 1.0.0)

## Additional context
Any other relevant information.
